examples.en: Please attach your resume to the application email.
examples.zh: 請將你的履歷附在應徵信中。

examples.en: She updated her resume before the job fair.
examples.zh: 她在就業博覽會前更新了履歷。

examples.en: Every applicant must fill out the online form.
examples.zh: 每位應徵者都必須填寫線上表格。

examples.en: They received over a hundred applicants for one position.
examples.zh: 他們一個職位收到超過一百位應徵者。

examples.en: The manager interviewed three strong candidates today.
examples.zh: 經理今天面試了三位優秀的候選人。

examples.en: She was the ideal candidate for the marketing role.
examples.zh: 她是行銷職位的理想人選。

examples.en: A good employer offers training to new staff.
examples.zh: 好的雇主會提供新進員工訓練。

examples.en: Your employer will contact you about the offer.
examples.zh: 你的雇主會就錄取事宜聯絡你。

examples.en: The company has over five hundred employees.
examples.zh: 這家公司有超過五百名員工。

examples.en: New employees attend orientation on their first day.
examples.zh: 新員工在第一天參加職前說明。

examples.en: The firm is recruiting engineers this quarter.
examples.zh: 這家公司這一季正在招募工程師。

examples.en: They recruit fresh graduates every summer.
examples.zh: 他們每年夏天招募社會新鮮人。

examples.en: There is a vacancy in the sales department.
examples.zh: 業務部門有一個職缺。

examples.en: The vacancy was filled within two weeks.
examples.zh: 這個職缺在兩週內就補滿了。

examples.en: He applied for a management position abroad.
examples.zh: 他應徵了一個國外的管理職位。

examples.en: This position requires two years of experience.
examples.zh: 這個職位需要兩年工作經驗。

examples.en: List your qualifications at the top of the resume.
examples.zh: 把你的資格條件列在履歷最上方。

examples.en: She has all the qualifications for the job.
examples.zh: 她具備這份工作所需的所有資格。

examples.en: The role calls for three years of work experience.
examples.zh: 這個職務要求三年工作經歷。

examples.en: Relevant experience will boost your application.
examples.zh: 相關經驗會讓你的應徵更有優勢。

examples.en: Communication is a key skill for this job.
examples.zh: 溝通是這份工作的關鍵技能。

examples.en: He listed his computer skills on the resume.
examples.zh: 他在履歷上列出他的電腦技能。

examples.en: I have a job interview tomorrow morning.
examples.zh: 我明天早上有一場工作面試。

examples.en: The interview lasted nearly an hour.
examples.zh: 面試持續了將近一個小時。

img: two people talking across a table

examples.en: The interviewer asked about my career goals.
examples.zh: 面試官問了我的職涯目標。

examples.en: Make eye contact with the interviewer.
examples.zh: 要與面試官保持眼神接觸。

examples.en: We have a strong candidate pool this year.
examples.zh: 我們今年有很強的人才庫。

examples.en: Her name stayed in the candidate pool for later.
examples.zh: 她的名字被留在人才庫供日後參考。

img: group of profile cards on board

examples.en: A short cover letter should explain why you fit.
examples.zh: 簡短的求職信應說明你為何適合。

examples.en: He tailored his cover letter for each company.
examples.zh: 他為每家公司量身撰寫求職信。

examples.en: Please provide two professional references.
examples.zh: 請提供兩位專業推薦人。

examples.en: Her former boss agreed to be a reference.
examples.zh: 她的前主管同意當推薦人。

examples.en: The salary for this role is quite competitive.
examples.zh: 這個職務的薪資相當有競爭力。

examples.en: They discussed salary at the final interview.
examples.zh: 他們在最後一輪面試談了薪資。

examples.en: The part-time job pays an hourly wage.
examples.zh: 這份兼職是按時薪計酬。

examples.en: Minimum wage rose again this year.
examples.zh: 基本工資今年又調漲了。

examples.en: The company offers great health benefits.
examples.zh: 這家公司提供很好的健康福利。

examples.en: Paid leave is one of the job's benefits.
examples.zh: 有薪假是這份工作的福利之一。

examples.en: Staff receive a year-end bonus in January.
examples.zh: 員工在一月領到年終獎金。

examples.en: A performance bonus motivates the team.
examples.zh: 績效獎金能激勵團隊。

examples.en: She accepted the job offer right away.
examples.zh: 她立刻接受了這份錄取通知。

examples.en: The offer included a signing bonus.
examples.zh: 這份工作邀約包含簽約獎金。

examples.en: The startup plans to hire ten developers.
examples.zh: 這家新創打算雇用十名開發人員。

examples.en: They hired her on the spot.
examples.zh: 他們當場就錄用了她。

examples.en: They rejected my application without a reason.
examples.zh: 他們沒說明理由就拒絕了我的申請。

examples.en: Don't give up if one company rejects you.
examples.zh: 被一家公司拒絕別放棄。

examples.en: He earned a promotion after two years.
examples.zh: 他兩年後獲得升遷。

examples.en: A promotion often means more responsibility.
examples.zh: 升遷通常代表更多責任。

examples.en: She built a successful career in finance.
examples.zh: 她在金融業建立了成功的職涯。

examples.en: This job is a great start to your career.
examples.zh: 這份工作是你職涯的絕佳起點。

examples.en: Teaching is a rewarding profession.
examples.zh: 教學是一份有意義的專業。

examples.en: She is proud of her profession.
examples.zh: 她對自己的行業感到驕傲。

examples.en: The internship gave her real work experience.
examples.zh: 這份實習給了她真實的工作經驗。

examples.en: He did a summer internship at a bank.
examples.zh: 他在一家銀行做了暑期實習。

examples.en: New hires go through a three-month probation.
examples.zh: 新進員工要經過三個月的試用期。

examples.en: She passed her probation with strong reviews.
examples.zh: 她以優異評價通過了試用期。

examples.en: Read the contract carefully before signing.
examples.zh: 簽約前要仔細閱讀合約。

examples.en: Her contract runs for one year.
examples.zh: 她的合約為期一年。

examples.en: You can negotiate your salary before accepting.
examples.zh: 接受前你可以協商薪資。

examples.en: They negotiated the start date politely.
examples.zh: 他們客氣地協商了報到日期。

img: two people discussing terms at table

examples.en: Networking helped him find hidden job openings.
examples.zh: 人脈經營幫他找到未公開的職缺。

examples.en: She attends events for networking.
examples.zh: 她參加活動來拓展人脈。

examples.en: Designers should bring a portfolio to interviews.
examples.zh: 設計師面試應攜帶作品集。

examples.en: Her online portfolio impressed the manager.
examples.zh: 她的線上作品集讓經理印象深刻。

examples.en: The application deadline is next Friday.
examples.zh: 應徵截止日期是下週五。

examples.en: Submit your resume before the deadline.
examples.zh: 請在截止期限前繳交履歷。

examples.en: My colleagues are friendly and helpful.
examples.zh: 我的同事既友善又樂於助人。

examples.en: She trained a new colleague last week.
examples.zh: 她上週訓練了一位新同事。

examples.en: Report any problems to your supervisor.
examples.zh: 有任何問題要向你的主管回報。

examples.en: Her supervisor praised her hard work.
examples.zh: 她的主管稱讚她的努力。

examples.en: She works in the human resources department.
examples.zh: 她在人力資源部門工作。

examples.en: Each department has its own manager.
examples.zh: 每個部門都有自己的經理。

examples.en: He worked overtime to meet the deadline.
examples.zh: 他為了趕上截止日而加班。

examples.en: Overtime is paid at a higher rate.
examples.zh: 加班以較高費率計酬。

img: worker at desk late at night

examples.en: She decided to resign after five years.
examples.zh: 她決定在五年後辭職。

examples.en: He resigned to start his own business.
examples.zh: 他辭職去創業。

examples.en: The company has a strong reputation for training.
examples.zh: 這家公司在培訓方面聲譽卓著。

examples.en: A good reputation attracts top talent.
examples.zh: 良好的信譽能吸引頂尖人才。

img: five star rating over a building

examples.en: Highlight your achievements on the resume.
examples.zh: 在履歷上凸顯你的成就。

examples.en: Winning that award was a huge achievement.
examples.zh: 贏得那個獎項是一大成就。

examples.en: The interviewer asked about my strengths.
examples.zh: 面試官問了我的優點。

examples.en: Teamwork is one of her greatest strengths.
examples.zh: 團隊合作是她最大的強項之一。

examples.en: Talk about a weakness you are improving.
examples.zh: 談一個你正在改進的缺點。

examples.en: Being too detailed is his main weakness.
examples.zh: 過於注重細節是他主要的缺點。

examples.en: Stay confident during the whole interview.
examples.zh: 整場面試都要保持自信。

examples.en: She sounded confident when answering questions.
examples.zh: 她回答問題時聽起來很有自信。

examples.en: Wear professional clothes to the interview.
examples.zh: 面試要穿專業的服裝。

examples.en: He gave a very professional presentation.
examples.zh: 他做了一場非常專業的簡報。

examples.en: Managing the budget is my main responsibility.
examples.zh: 管理預算是我主要的職責。

examples.en: The role comes with a lot of responsibility.
examples.zh: 這個職務伴隨許多責任。

examples.en: This job is a great opportunity to grow.
examples.zh: 這份工作是成長的絕佳機會。

examples.en: Don't miss the opportunity to learn new skills.
examples.zh: 別錯過學習新技能的機會。

examples.en: I plan to apply for that marketing job.
examples.zh: 我打算應徵那份行銷工作。

examples.en: You can apply online in a few minutes.
examples.zh: 你幾分鐘就能在線上完成應徵。

examples.en: Only five applicants were shortlisted.
examples.zh: 只有五位應徵者被列入候選名單。

examples.en: Being shortlisted is already a good sign.
examples.zh: 被列入候選名單已是好兆頭。

examples.en: The offer requires you to relocate to Taipei.
examples.zh: 這份工作邀約要求你搬遷到台北。

examples.en: She is willing to relocate for the right job.
examples.zh: 為了合適的工作她願意搬遷。

examples.en: Onboarding takes about one week here.
examples.zh: 這裡的新人培訓大約需要一週。

examples.en: Good onboarding helps new hires settle in.
examples.zh: 良好的到職培訓能幫新人快速適應。
